title: Keep My Creak
description: A datapack for your creaking-using redstone contraptions
body:
Allows you to summon a Creaking, that will persist whithout creaking heart, and will not despawn at daytime.
Usefull for creaking-powered redstone contraptions.

You can summon such Creaking like shown on the image bellow.
 ![How to summon a persistant creaking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3115b363b88cd547ae93716307fd2f5ee7b0e6bc_0.webp)
Note: the Item Frame is required.
